summary: Completed testing of Sales Rating + Feedback Pack and Branding + Enterprise PDF Pack. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend pages for admin branding settings, sales quality dashboard, and customer rating tasks are fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: All sales rating APIs properly handle CRUD operations with validation
Duplicate rating submission correctly returns 409 Conflict
Branding settings API properly merges defaults with custom values
Enterprise PDF generation using WeasyPrint works correctly with branding
All frontend components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Star rating input component is well-designed with accessibility labels

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load correctly with proper components

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed sales ratings for testing leaderboard and summary APIs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales Rating + Feedback Pack and Branding + Enterprise PDF Pack fully tested. Backend APIs: GET /api/sales-ratings/leaderboard (returns top rated advisors), GET /api/sales-ratings/pending-for-customer?customer_id=x (returns pending tasks), GET /api/sales-ratings/summary?sales_owner_id=x (returns rating stats), POST /api/sales-ratings/submit (submits rating with validation), GET /api/admin/branding-settings (returns branding config), PUT /api/admin/branding-settings (updates branding), GET /api/enterprise-docs/quote/{id}/pdf (generates PDF), GET /api/enterprise-docs/invoice/{id}/pdf, GET /api/enterprise-docs/order/{id}/pdf. Frontend pages: /admin/branding-settings (form with all company fields), /admin/sales-quality (dashboard with score card and leaderboard), /dashboard/rate-sales (customer rating tasks with modal). Test quote: QT-20260323-D1B15F.

Backend APIs.GET /api/sales-ratings/leaderboard: PASS - Returns list of top rated sales advisors sorted by rating
Backend APIs.GET /api/sales-ratings/pending-for-custo: PASS - Returns pending rating tasks for customer
Backend APIs.GET /api/sales-ratings/summary: PASS - Returns rating stats (count, average, 5-star count, recent feedback)
Backend APIs.POST /api/sales-ratings/submit: PASS - Submits rating with validation (1-5 stars, required fields)
Backend APIs.POST /api/sales-ratings/submit (duplicat: PASS - Returns 409 Conflict for duplicate submission
Backend APIs.POST /api/sales-ratings/submit (invalid: PASS - Returns 400 for stars outside 1-5 range
Backend APIs.GET /api/admin/branding-settings: PASS - Returns branding config with defaults
Backend APIs.PUT /api/admin/branding-settings: PASS - Updates branding config and persists changes
Backend APIs.GET /api/enterprise-docs/quote/{id}/pdf: PASS - Generates valid PDF (12KB) with branding

Frontend Pages./admin/branding-settings: PASS - Form with Company Name, Logo URL, Icon URL, Email, Phone, Address, TIN, VAT, PDF footer notes
Frontend Pages./admin/sales-quality: PASS - Dashboard with Customer Rating card and Top Rated Sales Advisors leaderboard
Frontend Pages./dashboard/rate-sales: PASS - Customer rating tasks page with empty state when no pending tasks

Frontend Components.BrandingSettingsPage: PASS - data-testid='branding-settings-page', all form fields present
Frontend Components.SalesDashboardQualityV3: PASS - data-testid='sales-quality-dashboard', shows score card and leaderboard
Frontend Components.CustomerSalesRatingTasksPage: PASS - data-testid='sales-rating-tasks-page', shows tasks or empty state
Frontend Components.StarRatingInput: PASS - data-testid='star-rating-input', data-testid='star-{n}' for each star
